title: stelis calceolaris
intro: Stelis calceolaris, also known as the slipper orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Central and South America. This plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Stelis calceolaris include treating fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and preventing oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Stelis calceolaris include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
